questions.question: Custom XCom backend (S3) — когда оправдан?

options.text: Когда XCom values > 48 KB (DB column limit). Small XComs остаются в DB (faster). Large — pickled, S3 PUT, reference в DB. Tradeoffs: 50-200ms S3 latency per op, $0.40/month за 1M operations, pickle security risk (RCE если bucket compromised), cleanup orphan files через lifecycle. Production use ONLY если actually нужен

questions.explanation: Custom XCom backend trade-offs: speed (S3 slower чем DB), cost (negligible), security (pickle RCE risk если malicious S3 write), cleanup (orphan files). Best practice: SIZE_THRESHOLD parameter (4 KB) — small XComs DB, large S3. Most workloads default DB XCom sufficient. Custom backend justified только для large dataframes (pandas, numpy arrays). Migration к 3.x preserves API — no code changes.

questions.question: Capstone: Kafka consumer task делает Variable.get(...) — внутри task, не top-level. Почему важно?

options.text: Top-level Variable.get выполняется на каждом DAG parse (~30s) → load на secrets backend (Vault/DB), slow parse. Внутри task — evaluates только при run. Модуль 02 quiz fundamentals — most common anti-pattern в production Airflow

questions.explanation: Variable.get / Connection.get / network calls в top-level DAG code — выполняются каждый DAG parse (default 30s). На 100 DAGs = 100 calls к Vault per minute → load + slow parse. Anti-pattern. Fix: переместить внутрь task callable (eval только при run), OR set env vars (loaded once при scheduler start). Capstone correctly delays — Vault hit только при task execution.

questions.question: Capstone use atomic S3 write (tmp + rename). Что предотвращает?

options.text: Partial writes visible downstream. Без atomic write: если task fails mid-PUT, downstream видит partially-written file. С tmp+rename: либо complete (final), либо нет файла. Idempotent — retry overwrites tmp без affecting final

questions.explanation: Atomic write pattern (модуль 17.02): write tmp, then rename. Downstream consumers видят либо старый файл, либо новый — никогда partially-written. На S3 'rename' = copy + delete (короткое окно с обоими), на HDFS — true atomic. Spark v2 output committer делает автоматически (algorithm.version=2). Critical для idempotent file-based pipelines.

questions.question: Capstone inlets/outlets на @task decorators дают automatic OpenLineage emission без custom extractors.
questions.explanation: OpenLineage provider (apache-airflow-providers-openlineage) reads inlets/outlets, emits Dataset events automatically. Declarative lineage — no extractor needed. capstone использует inlets=[Table(...)] + outlets=[asset(...)] на TaskFlow tasks. Marquez visualizes полный chain. Alternative для PythonOperator без inlets/outlets — custom extractor (more work). Best practice для maximum coverage: inlets/outlets везде + standard operators where possible (auto-emit без declarations).
